name: J1939ILDelayRxMessage
title: J1939ILDelayRxMessage
syntax: long J1939ILDelayRxMessage(dword pgn, dword sourceAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue, dword delay); // form 1
description: A message described in the function is only forwarded to the simulation node after the defined delay. As a result, the simulated node reacts to the message only after this delay.
You can also define a system variable which is set if the specified message is received.
To revert this command you can use J1939ILResetDelayedRxMessage or J1939ILResetAllDelayedRxMessage.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: Parameter Group Number (with data page) of the message to be delayed.
